question: What is the minimum weight of the car with 8 cylinders produced in 1974 ?
gold_sql: select min(weight) from cars_data where cylinders  =  8 and year  =  1974
predicted_sql: SELECT MIN(weig) FROM cars_data WHERE cyli = 8 AND yr = 1974;
raw_response: SELECT MIN(weig) FROM cars_data WHERE cyli = 8 AND yr = 1974;
